overview: Solemar is a vacation rental website for a beautiful seaside flat in Muro Alto, PE, Brasil. Guests can browse the property gallery, check amenities, and book their stay. Each booking automatically posts a tweet celebrating the new guest via Twitter/X OAuth integration.
features: Photo gallery with hotlinked property images
Booking flow with date picker, guest details, and confirmation code
Automatic Twitter/X tweet on each new booking via x-client package
Admin-only Settings page for OAuth Client ID and Twitter connection management
Warm seaside aesthetic with blues and sandy tones, fully responsive
